control_awareness: The amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) requires department head approval for this amount. Segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) prevents self-approval and pre-PO approval (P2P-C-003) mandates approval before purchase order issuance.
expected_control_effect: The request will be routed to the department head for approval, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given the expected absence of senior approvers causing potential delay, the best approach without inventing special routes is to create the full purchase request now to start the approval process promptly. Phased delivery is not operationally meaningful here, so splitting the request is unnecessary. This action respects all controls and objectives to keep procurement moving without avoidable delays.
reason: The total amount is above the 1,000,000 threshold, requiring department head approval. Despite the expected absence of senior approvers, submitting the full request immediately initiates the necessary approval and avoids delays.
